description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with interruptible jobs and a single stage named test. Add a test:install job that runs on a matrix of four Docker images (python:3.10-slim, python:3.11-slim, python:3.12-slim, python:3.13-slim) using the variable $IMG, executes before_script apt update -qq and apt install -y git, then runs ./install.py -vv, verifies a clean git status with git status --short && test "$(git status --short)" = "", and checks submodule paths with stat $(cat .gitmodules|grep path|sed -e 's/\spath\s=\s//'). Add a test:lint job that uses the python:slim image, sets PATH to $HOME/.local/bin:$PATH, upgrades pip, setuptools and wheel via pip install --user --upgrade pip, pip install --user --upgrade setuptools wheel, installs bandit, black, dlint, flake8 and related plugins via pip install --user --upgrade \ bandit \ black \ dlint \ flake8 \ flake8-annotations \ flake8-docstrings \ flake8-future-import \ flake8-import-order \ mypy \ pep8-naming \ pydocstyle \ types-termcolor, runs pip check, prints versions of black, flake8, and mypy, then runs black --diff --check ./install.py, flake8 --statistics install.py, and mypy --strict install.py. Both jobs belong to the test stage and have no artifacts, caches, or deployment steps. Ensure the pipeline respects the default interruptible setting.
